main.node: QTP Shadow Result — Manual Review Only

nodes.name: Scan All Tickers
nodes.notes: PATCH 2026-04-30: Rotating batch processing for Supabase Quantum Watchlist to avoid n8n 60s Code-node timeout. Batch size=125; no order/risk logic changed.

parameters.content:
## Broad Scanner (Real-Time Agent)

Loads 100+ tickers from Google Supabase table:
https://supabase/d/1gMSYFW6ZsJpIkyXQQZOxczfr1ryLC3pb1TI3C_-2v-E

Runs every 5 min during market hours (9:45-3:45 ET).
Batches Alpaca snapshots in groups of 100.
Max 1 signal per ticker per day.
Pushes to AI Super Score pipeline via webhook.

Signal types:
- MOMENTUM SHORT: -1%+ with volume
- MOMENTUM LONG: +1%+ with volume (VIX<30)
- STRUCTURE BREAK: 1.8x+ volume with -0.8%+

nodes.name: TEST_FIRST_CANDIDATE — SHADOW_ONLY_NO_ROUTING
nodes.notes: Fully self-contained synthetic TEST_FIRST_CANDIDATE shadow-only node. Intentionally unconnected. No imports, no credentials, no HTTP, no Alpaca, no Telegram, no Supabase production writes.

nodes.name: Prepare QTP Shadow Payload — DRY_RUN
nodes.notes: QTP Phase 6B non-blocking shadow observation branch. No live routing authority. Continue On Fail enabled.

parameters.jsCode:
const src = $json || {};
return {
  json: {
    mode: "SHADOW_ONLY_NO_ROUTING",
    shadow_phase: "PHASE5_N8N_CODE_FALLBACK_DRY_RUN",
    module: src.signal_source || src.module || "unknown",
    ticker: src.ticker || src.symbol || "UNKNOWN",
    timeframe: src.timeframe || src.tf || "unknown",
    pine_payload: src,
    ohlcv_recent_bars: src.ohlcv_recent_bars || src.ohlcv_recent_250 || [],
    cross_asset: src.cross_asset || {},
    shadow_only: true,
    shadow_parity_enabled: true,
    shadow_parity_mode: "SHADOW_ONLY_NO_ROUTING",
    order_intent: "NONE",
    alpaca_side_effects: "ZERO",
    telegram_side_effects: "ZERO",
    supabase_production_writes: "ZERO",
    live_path_impact: "ZERO"
  }
};

nodes.name: QTP Shadow Validator — N8N_CODE_FALLBACK
nodes.notes: QTP Phase 6B non-blocking shadow observation branch. No live routing authority. Continue On Fail enabled.
